k m equals square root of left parenthesis 16 square root of 2 right parenthesis squared end root plus open parentheses 6 close parentheses squared space space
equals square root of 72 plus 36 end root
equals square root of 108
equals 6 square root of 3
less than L equals 90 degree space left parenthesis k a r e n a space s i k u space s i k u right parenthesis
